title: Nordson Electronics Solutions Introduces New SELECT Synchro Selective Soldering System to Increase Throughput and Flexibility While Reducing Footprint and Cost-of-Ownership
text: CARLSBAD, Calif.--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Nordson Electronics Solutions, a global leader in electronics manufacturing technologies, introduces the new SELECT Synchro™ selective soldering system for high-volume printed circuit board assembly applications. The SELECT Synchro is a multi-station selective soldering system (patent pending) that uses a unique, synchronous motion to increase throughput, improve cost-of-ownership, and provide flexibility for electronics manufacturers.

title: End-Market Strength Aids Nordson (NDSN) Despite Cost Woes
text: Strength in the end markets, acquired assets and shareholder-friendly policies benefit Nordson (NDSN). Rising costs and expenses, and supply-side challenges raise a concern.

title: Nordson Corporation Releases Climate Targets and ESG Update
text: WESTLAKE, Ohio--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Nordson Corporation (Nasdaq: NDSN) today announced the release of its Climate Targets and Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) Update.

title: My 11 Best Dividend Kings For November 2022

title: CyberOptics 3D MRS® Sensing Technology Surpasses 32 Awards
text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #CYBE--Nordson Corporation (Nasdaq: NDSN) today announced that it received three 2022 Global Technology Awards in the categories of Metrology and AOI Inspection Systems for its CyberOptics SQ3000™+ and SPI Inspection Systems for its new CyberOptics Dual-Mode Multi-Reflection Suppression® (MRS)® sensor-enabled SE3000™ SPI system.

title: Nordson Corporation Completes Acquisition of CyberOptics Corporation
text: WESTLAKE, Ohio--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Nordson Corporation (Nasdaq: NDSN) has completed the acquisition of CyberOptics Corporation, a leading global developer and manufacturer of high-precision 3D optical sensing technology solutions.
